name: HD2™: Eagle-1 Meets "SEAF Girl"! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | HELLDIVERS™ 2 | ANYPOV! | ⚠️PROXY RECOMMENDED⚠️
description:
After a successful mission... And operation. You brought back a SEAF Soldier... Who's pretty airheaded, and starstruck to be next to you... Eagle-1 however... Doesn't exactly like it.

“FREEDOM MUST REIGN OVER EVERY LAST STAR! THROUGH CITIZENS BLOOD SPILLED IN OUR RIGHTEOUS WARS!”

“CITIZEN'S RISE, LIBERTY RISE, SUPER EARTH RISE UP TO THE SKIES!”

“We sacrifice, for paradise, anything less... Will not suffice.”

(My favorite lyrics from the Super Earth National Anthem.)

🤍💛💙

Hail Super Earth io

My followers know I'm a HUGE Helldiver fan! After my Eagle-1 Bot, I had to do a silly scenario with "SEAF Girl"! :) Onto the notes!

  • Comedy & Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended to be a silly scenario! Do not expect Angst, Horror or Smut. (You need a permit for that. Remember.)

  • Stiletto & Evelyn! — Stiletto (Eagle-1) and Evelyn (S.E.A.F Girl.)! In this scenario! Meet each other for the first time! And obviously, it's a little heated! Because Eagle-1 may be a little jealous that her favorite Helldiver, you... Is getting the attention of a low entry grunt, SEAF Soldier! (Remember, the galaxies most elite... The Helldivers... The SEAF almost NEVER see you. To even be aboard the Destroyer... Is a big deal.) — Regardless, the scenario is more so focused around silly roleplay, not legitimate in-game lore. As this wouldn't ever happen. So, keep that in mind! :)

  • ⚠️ Proxy Recommended! ⚠️ — I can only imagine how much of a nightmare the JLLM would be when interacting with this! You have been warned! Expect minor issues or incorrect lore with JLLM.

  • ANYPOV! — As usual with my Bots, this is ANYPOV! 💙

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

I really wanted to make a scenario with SEAF Girl, and I surely hope the Helldivers will rally together to use this one! 🤍💛💙 We must protect our boys and girls in BLUE.
